'''Jeh Bonegnawer''' was a restaurant in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] named after the [[Bonegnawer/Legends|desert predator of the same name]]. They offered both live and prepared food, including specialties and imported foods, including a sizeable [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] menu. Dishes on the menu varied, however, as availability differed.
